resources.string: List of steps to %s. Activate to expand.
Get reminders to update information about your account settings
You\'re getting updates on new & trending places based on your preferences
Get updates on new & trending places based on your preferences
You\'re getting updates about responses to questions you asked businesses in Maps
Get responses to questions you asked businesses in Maps
You\'re getting updates about lists you own and edit
Get updates about lists you own and edit
You\'re getting reminders to update information about your commute preferences
Get reminders to update information about your commute preferences
Continue for one and a half kilometers
Continue for one and a half miles
Continue for three quarters of a mile
Continue on %1$s for a half mile
Continue on %1$s for a quarter mile
Continue on %1$s for one and a half kilometers
Continue on %1$s for one and a half miles
Continue on %1$s for three quarters of a mile
In one and a half kilometers
In one and a half miles
In three quarters of a mile
You should reach your destination by %1$s
Your destination is half a mile ahead
Your destination is a quarter mile ahead
Your destination is one and a half kilometers ahead
Your destination is one and a half miles ahead
Your destination is three quarters of a mile ahead

Keep your eyes on the road and obey applicable laws. Do not manipulate this application while in motion. Directions may be inaccurate, incomplete, dangerous, not suitable, prohibited, or involve crossing administrative areas. Data is not real-time, and location accuracy cannot be guaranteed.
Google Maps Navigation is in beta. Use caution.
Add to see compatible charging stops
It looks like you\'ve left the route, so I\'ll re-route you.
You\'re getting updates about your location history
Get updates about your location history
Get reminders to update your home and work addresses
You\'re getting updates about your friends and their shared location
Get updates about your friends and their shared location
Get updates when your shared location is being updated
You\'re getting updates about sharing your location
Get updates about sharing your location
Only tap if it\'s safe to do so
Don\'t forget to pay attention to your surroundings and always obey the law.

%1$s

When you use %2$s, Google collects navigation data, such as GPS location and the route you took, to improve Google Maps for everyone. This data may be used to make information, including real-time traffic conditions and disruptions, visible to others and help them find the fastest route.

These updates to the map won’t be associated with your Google Account or device.

%3$s

%4$s

When you add a report or suggest any map edits, this data may be used across Google services.
Google’s %1$s and %2$s apply.\n\n%3$s may also collect and use similar data. Refer to %4$s App’s Privacy Policy for more information.
How driver reports and edits are used
There has been an error while loading the Navigation terms of service. Please restart the app.
You\'re getting recommendations about places and events nearby
Know when you\'re near one of your saved places or events
Get recommendations about places and events nearby
You\'re getting updates about new things you can do on Maps
Get occasional updates about new things you can do on Maps
You\'re getting updates about the areas saved to your phone or tablet
Get updates about the areas saved to your phone or tablet
You\'re getting updates about your parking location
Get updates about your parking location
You\'re getting reminders to upload photos and tag dishes based on places you\'ve visited
Get reminders to upload photos and tag dishes based on places you\'ve visited
You\'re getting updates about your pickup orders on Maps
Get updates on order status, and reminders to share arrival time and check in
You\'re getting questions about places you\'ve visited so others know what to expect
Answer questions about places you\'ve visited so others know what to expect
Speed camera added to the map
Adding speed camera to the map
Stalled vehicle added to the map
Adding stalled vehicle to the map
Lane closure added to the map
Adding lane closure to the map
Mobile speed camera added to the map
Adding mobile speed camera to the map
Object on road added to the map
Adding object on road to the map
Only tap if it\'s safe to do so
Speed trap added to the map
Adding speed trap to the map
You\'re getting reminders to write reviews based on places you’ve visited
Get reminders to write reviews based on places you’ve visited
To take the faster route, tap %1$s.
If you prefer to stay on the current route, tap %1$s.
To preview more steps, pull over when safe
You\'re getting reminders when it’s time to leave based on events from your Gmail and Calendar
Get reminders when it’s time to leave based on events from your Gmail and Calendar
Trip feedback is used across Google
You\'re getting traffic conditions based on your current location
Get traffic conditions based on your current location
You\'re getting warnings about planned road closures and events that may affect traffic
Get warnings about planned road closures and events that may affect traffic
You\'re getting departures, disruptions, and maps from nearby stations
Get departures, disruptions, and maps from nearby stations
You\'re getting updates on likes and comments, and when you earn badges and perks
Get updates on likes and comments, and when you earn badges and perks
You\'re getting questions about your local neighborhood, roads & trips
Help improve Maps by answering questions about your local neighborhood, roads & trips
You\'re getting reminders and updates about your business
Get reminders and updates about your business
You\'re getting updates when your profile has a new follower or you receive a follow request
Get updates when your profile has a new follower or receives a follow request
This app uses an outdated version of Maps. It might not work properly.
Google Maps is not installed or is disabled
Map disabled because Quota is EXCEEDED
Map disabled because Quota status is BLOCKED
